cvrf:DocumentPublisher.cvrf:IssuingAuthority: The Microsoft Security Response Center (MSRC) identifies, monitors, resolves, and responds to security incidents and Microsoft software security vulnerabilities. For more information, see http://www.microsoft.com/security/msrc.

cvrf:DocumentNotes.cvrf:Note:
This release consists of the following 7 Microsoft CVEs:

Tag CVE Base Score CVSS Vector Exploitability FAQs? Workarounds? Mitigations?
Azure Custom Locations Resource Provider (RP) CVE-2026-26135 9.6 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N/E:U/RL:O/RC:C N/A Yes No No
Azure SRE Agent CVE-2026-32173 8.6 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N/E:U/RL:O/RC:C N/A Yes No No
Microsoft Bing CVE-2026-32186 N/A N/A N/A Yes No No
Azure MCP Server CVE-2026-32211 9.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N/E:U/RL:O/RC:C N/A Yes No No
Azure AI Foundry CVE-2026-32213 10.0 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H/E:U/RL:O/RC:C N/A Yes No No
Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Service CVE-2026-33105 10.0 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H/E:U/RL:O/RC:C N/A Yes No No
Azure Databricks CVE-2026-33107 10.0 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H/E:U/RL:O/RC:C N/A Yes No No

We are republishing 18 non-Microsoft CVEs:

CNA Tag CVE FAQs? Workarounds? Mitigations?
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5272 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5273 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5274 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5275 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5276 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5277 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5279 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5280 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5281 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5283 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5284 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5285 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5286 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5287 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5289 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5290 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5291 Yes No No
Chrome Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) CVE-2026-5292 Yes No No

The information provided in the Microsoft Knowledge Base is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. Microsoft disclaims all warranties, either express or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. In no event shall Microsoft Corporation or its suppliers be liable for any damages whatsoever including direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, loss of business profits or special damages, even if Microsoft Corporation or its suppliers have been advised of the possibility of such damages. Some states do not allow the exclusion or limitation of liability for consequential or incidental damages so the foregoing limitation may not apply.

prod:Branch.Name: Azure
prod:Branch.prod:FullProductName: Azure SRE Agent Gateway - SignalR Hub

prod:ProductTree.prod:FullProductName: Azure SRE Agent Gateway - SignalR Hub

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: XZ Utils: Buffer overflow in lzma_index_append()
OpenPrinting CUPS: Path traversal in RSS notify-recipient-uri enables file write outside CacheDir/rss (and clobbering of job.cache)
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: OpenPrinting CUPS: Authorization bypass via case-insensitive group-member lookup
io_uring/poll: fix multishot recv missing EOF on wakeup race
mac80211: fix crash in ieee80211_chan_bw_change for AP_VLAN stations
drm/amdgpu: Limit BO list entry count to prevent resource exhaustion
ipv6: add NULL checks for idev in SRv6 paths
util-linux: TOCTOU Race Condition in util-linux mount(8) - Loop Device Setup
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: ksmbd: use volume UUID in FS_OBJECT_ID_INFORMATION
netfilter: conntrack: add missing netlink policy validations
Util-linux: util-linux: access control bypass due to improper hostname canonicalization
Poetry Has Wheel Path Traversal Which Can Lead to Arbitrary File Write
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Vim modeline bypass via various options affects Vim < 9.2.0276
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Avahi: Reachable assertion in `transport_flags_from_domain()` via conflicting publish flags crashes avahi-daemon
CUPS has an integer underflow in `_ppdCreateFromIPP` causes root cupsd crash via negative `job-password-supported`
Heap Buffer Overflow in Hexadecimal Conversion
Potential Use-after-free in DANE Client Code
Incorrect Failure Handling in RSA KEM RSASVE Encapsulation
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: NULL Pointer Dereference When Processing a Delta CRL
ONNX: Arbitrary File Read via ExternalData Hardlink Bypass in ONNX load
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: apparmor: fix: limit the number of levels of policy namespaces
KVM: x86/mmu: Drop/zap existing present SPTE even when creating an MMIO SPTE
xmldom: XML injection via unsafe CDATA serialization allows attacker-controlled markup insertion

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Memory Allocation with Excessive Size Value

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: OpenPrinting CUPS: Heap overflow in `get_options()`
OpenPrinting CUPS: Shared PostScript queue lets anonymous Print-Job requests reach `lp` code execution over the network
OpenPrinting CUPS: Local print admin token disclosure using temporary printers
serial: core: fix infinite loop in handle_tx() for PORT_UNKNOWN
wifi: mac80211: always free skb on ieee80211_tx_prepare_skb() failure
Bluetooth: SCO: Fix use-after-free in sco_recv_frame() due to missing sock_hold
Path traversal issue with zip.vim in Vim
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: CUPS has a use-after-free in `cupsdDeleteTemporaryPrinters` via dangling subscription pointer
Libinput: libinput: unauthorized code execution and information disclosure through lua bytecode plugins
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: ONNX: Malicious ONNX models can crash servers by exploiting unprotected object settings.
Sleuth Kit ISO9660 SUSP Extension Reference Out-of-Bounds Read
Sleuth Kit APFS Keybag Parser Out-of-Bounds Read
Sleuth Kit tsk_recover Path Traversal
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Vim Ex command injection in Vims NetBeans integration
vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:CWE: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: apparmor: fix memory leak in verify_header
apparmor: replace recursive profile removal with iterative approach
apparmor: fix side-effect bug in match_char() macro usage
apparmor: fix missing bounds check on DEFAULT table in verify_dfa()
apparmor: Fix double free of ns_name in aa_replace_profiles()
apparmor: fix differential encoding verification
apparmor: fix race on rawdata dereference
apparmor: fix race between freeing data and fs accessing it
Azure AI Foundry Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Improper authorization in Azure AI Foundry allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Chromium: CVE-2026-5289 Use after free in Navigation

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: This CVE was assigned by Chrome. Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) ingests Chromium, which addresses this vulnerability. Please see Google Chrome Releases for more information.

Why is this Chrome CVE included in the Security Update Guide?

The vulnerability assigned to this CVE is in Chromium Open Source Software (OSS) which is consumed by Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based). It is being documented in the Security Update Guide to announce that the latest version of Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) is no longer vulnerable.

How can I see the version of the browser?

  1. In your Microsoft Edge browser, click on the 3 dots (...) on the very right-hand side of the window
  2. Click on Help and Feedback
  3. Click on About Microsoft Edge

What is the version information for this release?

Microsoft Edge Version Date Released Based on Chromium Version
146.0.3856.97 04/02/2026 146.0.7680.178

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: This CVE was assigned by Chrome. Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) ingests Chromium, which addresses this vulnerability. Please see Google Chrome Releases for more information. Google is aware that an exploit for CVE-2026-5281 exists in the wild.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Azure Databricks Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Azure Databricks allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Azure Custom Locations Resource Provider (RP) Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Azure Custom Locations Resource Provider (RP) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Improper authorization in Microsoft Azure Kubernetes Service allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Azure SRE Agent Information Disclosure Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Improper authentication in Azure SRE Agent allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Azure MCP Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Missing authentication for critical function in Azure MCP Server allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Chromium: CVE-2026-5291 Inappropriate implementation in WebGL

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: This CVE was assigned by Chrome. Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) ingests Chromium, which addresses this vulnerability. Please see Google Chrome Releases for more information.

Why is this Chrome CVE included in the Security Update Guide?

The vulnerability assigned to this CVE is in Chromium Open Source Software (OSS) which is consumed by Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based). It is being documented in the Security Update Guide to announce that the latest version of Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) is no longer vulnerable.

How can I see the version of the browser?

  1. In your Microsoft Edge browser, click on the 3 dots (...) on the very right-hand side of the window
  2. Click on Help and Feedback
  3. Click on About Microsoft Edge

What is the version information for this release?

Microsoft Edge Version Date Released Based on Chromium Version
146.0.3856.97 04/02/2026 146.0.7680.178

vuln:Vulnerability.vuln:Title: Microsoft Bing Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

vuln:Notes.vuln:Note: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Microsoft Bing allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

Why are there no links to an update or instructions with steps that must be taken to protect from this vulnerability?

This vulnerability has already been fully mitigated by Microsoft. There is no action for users of this service to take. The purpose of this CVE is to provide further transparency.

Please see Toward greater transparency: Unveiling Cloud Service CVEs for more information.

vuln:Revision.cvrf:Description: Updated information to include CVSS scores. This is an informational change only.
